title: The Cheyenne Kid
writer: Jack Curtis, W.C. Tuttle, Keene Thompson
actors: Tom Keene, Mary Mason, Roscoe Ates
plot: Chasing a gambler that stole money, Tom Larkin gets his horse shot out from under him. Meeting an outlaw with a horse, after a fight Tom rides away on that horse. Arriving in town he is mistaken for the outlaw and offered a job of...
